audit_items.proof_trace: resolv_cancel() incorrectly calls ss_free() on dns_query structures at line 223, but these are allocated and owned by libudns which expects to free them in dns_end_query() or dns_close(). This causes double-free when the program later shuts down.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Client triggers DNS resolution then disconnects, causing close_and_free_server() → resolv_cancel() → ss_free() of libudns-owned memory, leading to heap corruption on program shutdown.
